includedLineSamples: droisys is an innovation technology company focused on helping companies accelerate their digital initiatives from strategy and planning through execution. we leverage deep technical expertise, agile methodologies, and data-driven intelligence to modernize systems of engagement and simplify human/tech interaction.

amazing things happen when we work in environments where everyone feels a true sense of belonging and when candidates have the requisite skills and opportunities to succeed. at droisys, we invest in our talent and support career growth, and we are always on the lookout for amazing talent who can contribute to our growth by delivering top results for our clients. join us to challenge yourself and accomplish work that matters.
should be open to travel to san jose, ca and las vegas, ca

strategy.readerGoal: Prove customer-facing growth readiness through communication, revenue-adjacent impact, and truthful product interest.

tailorAssist.paragraph: I treated this as a Software Engineer at Droisys draft and made React, PostgreSQL, and amazon web services easy to find. You already had the right raw material: React, PostgreSQL, amazon web services, and delivery. I pushed that proof forward in Centi – Personal Finance App and Taylor.io – Resume Builder & Parser. Prove customer-facing growth readiness through communication, revenue-adjacent impact, and truthful product interest. I trimmed Bar Louie Server, SecureScape – Smart Security System, Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website, and SentimentTrader - Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline because they were weaker signals for this read. The biggest help here: kept the projects that best prove the role fit, reframed your experience around the job's strongest signals, and gave the summary a clearer role-specific angle. Under the hood, I changed the summary, experience, projects, and skills based on those signals.

details.title: What I prioritized
items: Prove customer-facing growth readiness through communication, revenue-adjacent impact, and truthful product interest.
I prioritized customer communication, people-facing work, revenue-adjacent metrics, relationship handling, and domain-relevant product interest.

details.title: Why it changed
items: Target story: Proven experience in building scalable web applications and APIs using React and PostgreSQL, with a strong focus on customer-centric solutions.
Main evidence themes: customer communication, API development, and data management.

details.title: Related evidence
items: deployment: related evidence includes aws, ec2, and deployed.

details.title: Not directly evidenced
items: I did not claim CI/CD because those exact tools or platforms were not in the resume.

details.title: Worth checking
items: Do not call the candidate a sales professional unless formal sales or outreach....
Do not claim unsupported terms directly: ci/cd, graphql, microservices, develop...
Some JD terms were not directly evidenced: ci/cd, graphql, microservices, and developer.
Review the skills list; a few useful-but-lower-priority skills may have been trimmed.

skills: Skills guard restored 6 skill row(s) because Pass B exceeded the deletion budget.

changeReasons.reason: Repositioned the professional summary toward Software Engineer using concrete, on-resume evidence where possible.
experience row 5: light wording pass; the core scope stayed the same.
Removed Bar Louie Server because it was less relevant for this draft.
project 9: revised the description and stack so the fit is easier to scan.
project 10: light cleanup to the description or stack.
Removed SecureScape – Smart Security System because stronger project evidence fit this role better.
Removed Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website because stronger project evidence fit this role better.

summary.after_preview: Full-stack engineer with a proven track record in building scalable web applications and APIs using React and PostgreSQL. Experienced in developing customer-centric solutions and collaborating effectively in technical environments.
